title: Anyone get this connected to Azure
excerpt: Anyone get this working in any way shape or form with Azure, Azure Data Factory, Azure SQL? I need to get data from azure to Monday in bulk or 1:1 I don’t care just automated. I could get the API to work in postman but n…

posts.author: kristylynn9598 (Kristy Stanley)
posts.cookedHtml: Anyone get this working in any way shape or form with Azure, Azure Data Factory, Azure SQL? I need to get data from azure to Monday in bulk or 1:1 I don’t care just automated. I could get the API to work in postman but never got azure to authenticate with my key.

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kristylynn9598

What exactly are you trying to achieve here?

  • Import data from a service in Azure into MDC?
  • Sync data back & forth between Azure & MDC?

Is this something you want changing in real time, or “every time period” like in an automation recipe?

Is this something you are building yourself, or do you just want a commercial solution to the problem?
